title: A deadline for the Iran war is here. What does the War Powers Act say?
snippet: WaPo comprehensive analysis of WPR deadline. Trump notified Congress March 2 → 60 days = May 1. Historical context of WPR. Congress left town without action. Legal scholars divided. Blockade as act of war debate.
tag_reason: WPR 데드라인 당일 종합 분석 — 4/30 청문회·표결의 후속
